THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEST DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION CO., A CALIFORNIA CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITVAK, VLADIMIR (LIS ELECTRIC, INC.) $4,045.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,112.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
